## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code change that neither adds a feature nor fixes a bug
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] test: adding or correcting tests
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] ci: continuous integration changes

## Quant checklist

- [ ] No look-ahead bias introduced (verified by property test if relevant)
- [ ] Survivorship bias considered and documented
- [ ] Transaction costs and slippage modeled where applicable
- [ ] Tests added or updated; coverage maintained at >= 90% on touched modules
- [ ] mypy strict passes
- [ ] Methodology doc updated if math or assumption changed
- [ ] No em dashes in human-written prose

## Test plan

<!-- How a reviewer can verify the change locally. -->
